rationale: Comprehensive 44-file Next.js supermarket site (Certo Atacado) implementation matching the Portuguese PR description. Admin panel pages under `src/app/admin/` provide login, dashboard, and full CRUD over encartes (flyers), categorias, temas, sorteios (raffles), and produtos, plus their `novo` (new) and `[id]` (edit/detail) routes. The API routes under `src/app/api/{encartes,produtos,...}/route.ts` and `[id]/route.ts` cover the backend surface. Public site adds `/nossa-historia`, `/fale-conosco`, `/trabalhe-conosco` routes, the hero block with animated SVG mascot (`pullFromLeft` + `mascotEntrance` keyframes), the Embla-Carousel auto-play carousels for encartes/sorteios/produtos, the green Televendas WhatsApp button in the header, the orange footer with the documented contact info (contato@certoatacado.com, three phone numbers, 9 payment-method badges, Pesquisa de Satisfação, Política de Privacidade, Termos de Uso, Acesso Restrito), and the Nossas Lojas section with four real stores (Taquara-Medianeira, Taquara-Santa Maria, Parobé-Centro, Taquara-Centro) plus 'Ver no Mapa' hover. `next.config.ts`, `package.json` / `package-lock.json` add Embla + Cloudinary deps. The PR self-discloses '10 warnings (img vs next/image), 0 errors' which is consistent with the honest scope claim. No cheat patterns.
